name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-46
title: workspace-tree.py ANNOTATIONS dict references dead .sh files in rabbit-bug/rabbit-backlog annotations
description: scripts/workspace-tree.py ANNOTATIONS at lines 77-80 annotates 'rabbit-bug' with '(file-bug.sh, bug-status.sh, list-bugs.sh)' and 'rabbit-backlog' with '(file-backlog-item.py, backlog-item-status.py)'. The .sh files for rabbit-bug do not exist — bug filing was migrated to rabbit-file/scripts/file-item.py (the rabbit-bug feature itself may also have been consolidated into rabbit-file per recent renames). The rabbit-backlog .py file names may also be stale. STRUCTURAL_DIRS still contains 'rabbit-bug' and 'rabbit-backlog' literal names (lines 88-89) — confirm they are still valid feature directories or remove. Also STRUCTURAL_DIRS includes 'backlog' (singular) which has no corresponding path; 'backlogs' (plural) is correct.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
